combos.notes: Super basic 3-hit combo that knocks the opponent down and lets Cammy get in close.
Higher damage and more corner carry than the above combo. Suitable if you happen to punish someone who is pressing buttons.
Basic jump-in combo. The hitbox of j.HP is easier to connect with, but j.HK hits from farther away.
Basic combo for a Punish Counter Drive Impact anywhere on screen.
Basic confirm and frame trap string, as the LKs and LPs chain into each other.
Basic link from a 2HP starter. 2HP is easiest to land after Spiral Arrow; simply dash and hit the button immediately to beat any of the opponent's non-invincible wakeup options.
A more complex version of the jump-in combo that uses the 2HP, 2MP link for more damage.
Any of her medium buttons getting Drive Rush Cancelled lets her get 2HP or 5HP as her next button
While 5MP is not directly cancelable, the extra hitstun on hit enables 5HP and 2HP links as well
She's not limited to only 2MP or 5HP as her starters either. If LP or 5LK is Drive Rush Cancelled, Cammy can easily get 5LP, 5HP as a link
The medium Spiral Arrow is the most reliable zero-drive follow-up as light and heavy versions can whiff
Simple follow-up by linking DR 5HP into target combo
Higher damage combo that side switches. 623HK can be replaced with SA1 for damage. Not recommended to end with SA3 as it will deal less damage than 4HK, SA3
Corner combo for more damage
Incredible corner carry combo. Note that if you cancel instead of linking 236HK, this will whiff.
For 1 more drive gauge you can get 400 more damage
Corner lets Cammy followup with another 4HK after DR 4HK. Can replace 623HK with SA1/SA3 for 3575(4595) damage.
Can still followup 2nd 4HK with 5HP, but in this case you can't cancel into spin knuckle, as it won't juggle
Good follow-up to a LP that's part of a frame trap light string.

Scores a bit more damage by linking 5MP into 5HP. 5MP is a good frame trap tool from Drive Rush starters on block; a common sequence is DR~5MP (blocked), CH 5MP, 5HP which can be confirmed on reaction.

Basic combo from a CH Spin Knuckle if the opponent is too slow when trying to interrupt the startup. HP Spin Knuckle has too much pushback for 4MP to connect, so the route is actually weaker than the MP version. 5HP > 214LP is a frame trap against lights, while 5HP > 214MP frame traps during Burnout. 214HP is never a true 4f trap without Drive Rush + Burnout.

Basic combo from a CH Spin Knuckle if the opponent is too slow when trying to interrupt the startup. HP Spin Knuckle has too much pushback for 4MP to connect, so the route is actually weaker than the MP version. 5HP > 214LP is a frame trap against lights, while 5HP > 214MP frame traps during Burnout. 214HP is never a true 4f trap without Drive Rush + Burnout.

Basic combo from a CH Spin Knuckle if the opponent is too slow when trying to interrupt the startup. HP Spin Knuckle has too much pushback for 4MP to connect, so the route is actually weaker than the MP version. 5HP > 214LP is a frame trap against lights, while 5HP > 214MP frame traps during Burnout. 214HP is never a true 4f trap without Drive Rush + Burnout.
Short combo ending in Super Art 1 from CH 5MP.
Meter dump combo from CH 5MP. Useful to keep in mind if the opponent is around half health or below.
A difficult juggle that allows a midscreen launch into Spiral Arrow + Cannon Spike. If you fully hold the 236[HK], it will juggle for a side switch and slightly less damage.
Useful 4f punish starter that works from max jab range. Converting jab punishes into 236MK gives better damage, oki, and corner carry than the usual light confirms.

Important punish for many of the game's -5 or -6 attacks with high pushback. Somewhat expensive relative to its damage output, but useful for securing a kill against "safe-ish" moves. To conserve Drive meter, 5LK > 236HK also combos on Punish Counter for 1260 damage.
Reliable 8f punish option even from max range 5HP. Can also end with 236KK > 623HK or SA1/SA3 to increase damage.
Meterless side switch that does slightly more damage than the 214HP route. Useful if you start with your back to the wall, but doesn't allow for good oki.

Fairly strong punish for 1 Drive bar. Switches sides and returns back to midscreen, so it's most useful as an SA1 kill route when you want to conserve meter for the next round. Must be fairly close for the 4HK to link properly.
Cheap corner optimization for significant damage. 623HK can be replaced with SA1 or SA3 with forgiving timing.
Example of more optimal SA3 route due to combo scaling

High damage Punish Counter combo that spends all resources to ensure a kill. If only SA1 is available, you can instead end the last Drive Rush loop with DR~4HK, 4HK, 236LK, SA1 for 4204 damage. If starting from full Drive meter, it is possible to microwalk in between DR~2HP and 5HP to allow an extra Drive Rush loop. However, the damage boost is small, the difficulty is high, and it won't work if you blocked anything right before the punish starter.

combos.combo: PC 2HP, 5HP > DR~4HK, DR~5HP > 214LP, DR~4HK > DR~6HK > 623[HK] > SA3
combos.notes: A slightly more damaging but more difficult cash out combo to ensure a kill. As long as you have over 5 bars of Drive meter before the first Drive Rush cancel, you will have enough meter for the combo. If starting the combo from midscreen, you should instead replace the 623[HK] with a 236LK and then link into SA3 for slightly less damage (5872, 6122 with CA). Slightly higher damage if started with 8/9HP
Strong anti-fireball punish option that leads to damage and corner carry.
Corner version of the fireball punish that launches for extra damage.

Basic combo after a blocked Drive Impact into wallsplat. If the DI connects too far from the corner, you must walk forward slightly before 5HP. If you accidentally use 236MK, only 623LK is fast enough to finish the juggle (for slightly less damage).
5HP > 236MK allows a 623HK juggle after a grounded Drive Impact on hit only, for slightly more damage than the blocked wallsplat version
5HP > 236MK allows a 623HK juggle after a grounded Drive Impact on hit only, for slightly more damage than the blocked wallsplat version
If the wallsplat occurs high up after the DI hits airborne, you can juggle the 2nd hit of 236HK instead of the usual 236LK/236MK.
Basic corner carry combo from a Punish Counter Drive Impact. Ending with 623HK instead gives slightly better damage, but much worse midscreen oki.
In the corner, Cammy gets increased damage by going directly into her 4HK launcher.

combos.combo: PC Drive Impact, walk forward, 5MP, 4MP~HK, j.MP > 214K/214KK
combos.notes: Basic launch combo from a Punish Counter Drive Impact. Must be at close range for 5MP, 4MP to link, but if you wait too long the opponent will become airborne. 214K brings the opponent straight down, while 214KK allows a cancel to SA2 > 236LK or a juggle into SA1/SA3 for extra damage and corner carry. Additionally, after an immediate forward dash upon landing, 2HP is an autotimed +4 meaty. Only works if you end the combo with 214HK; the j.MP > 214HK must be performed immediately after the jump.

As of Patch 10.15.2025, 236LK can occasionally juggle into 236MK, giving slightly higher damage and improved corner carry. The 5HP must be delayed until the opponent begins the falling-on-knees animation before continuing the combo. After the PC Drive Impact, you can forward dash twice to autotime the 5HP, which increases corner carry, but the timing is very strict, with only a 2-frame margin of error. Midscreen, the combo can end with 236MK for 60 extra damage, but this significantly reduces oki. In the corner, other combos are generally more optimal.
Basic follow-up from Razor's Edge Slicer. The [HP] and OD versions can juggle after the 2nd hit, giving more damage and hitconfirm time.
Follow-up to Reverse Edge that leaves the opponent grounded. Can cash out with any ender of choice after 5HP. For a slightly easier link, can use 2MP instead.
Launches the opponent after a Reverse Edge overhead, allowing for a +54 knockdown to comfortably loop Hooligan setups.
Damage cashout after an enhanced Fatal Leg Twister. Using 236LK makes the juggle easier for 80 less damage. Opponent will reach the corner if thrown ~1/3 screen away from the corner.
A simple Super cashout after enhanced Fatal Leg Twister that works without any additional Drive cost.

Sets up a +54 knockdown for Hooligan pressure after enhanced Fatal Leg Twister. Can optionally juggle 623HK, SA1, or SA3 after the 236LK. SA3 damage is actually weaker in this route compared to an immediate SA3 juggle.
